product.name: Your Product
product.description: See DOCS/VALUE_PROP.md — fill this in before running enrichment

factletTopics: (define topics broadly relevant to your audience — used to evaluate RSS articles)

evaluatorCriteria.name: Specificity
evaluatorCriteria.description: Draft references something specific to THIS client — not generic
evaluatorCriteria.passExample: Mentions a recent event, news item, or known pain specific to them
evaluatorCriteria.failExample: Could have been sent to anyone on the list

evaluatorCriteria.name: Pain-to-Product
evaluatorCriteria.description: Connects their observable situation to what the product solves — in one sentence
evaluatorCriteria.passExample: Clear causal link: their problem → your solution
evaluatorCriteria.failExample: Product pitch with no connection to their world

evaluatorCriteria.name: Brevity
evaluatorCriteria.description: Under 150 words. Every sentence earns its place.
evaluatorCriteria.failExample: Padded with pleasantries or redundant sentences

evaluatorCriteria.name: Opens strong
evaluatorCriteria.description: First sentence creates urgency or curiosity — does NOT open with seller name/product name
evaluatorCriteria.passExample: Leads with their world, a question, or a surprising fact
evaluatorCriteria.failExample: "My name is X and I'm reaching out about Y"

evaluatorCriteria.name: Reply Test
evaluatorCriteria.description: Would a busy decision-maker actually reply to this?
evaluatorCriteria.passExample: Clear hook, specific ask, low friction
evaluatorCriteria.failExample: Vague, too long, or asks for a 30-minute call as the first ask

outreachRules.tone: confident, direct, human — no corporate speak
outreachRules.openWith: Lead with THEIR world — never with your name or product name
outreachRules.closeWith: Close with a command, not a hope ('Let's talk Thursday' not 'I hope to hear from you')
forbidden: I hope this finds you well

configSeed._comment: OPTIONAL. Pre-populates the Config table at build time — enables headless install. Delete this block to leave Config empty and let init-wizard fill it interactively. If leedzEmail is set but leedzSession is omitted, deploy.js generates a 1-year HS256 JWT automatically.

rssConfig._comment: Feeds live in skills/rss-factlet-harvester/rss_sources.md, not here. Only additionalKeywords is honored at deploy time.
